reviews.review_description:
First, if the developers wanted to, they could easily translate this to English or at the very least have balloons with text in English. Not a big problem though, since we're here mostly for the view.

Second, there's the quality. It's a mix of low quality 2D, high quality 2D and medium to high quality 3D with a mix of animation and real life footage. Interesting.

Third, there are some bugs. Irresponsive menus, blank canvas on some sculptures.

Fourth, there's the download time. I suppose their servers are located in Germany only.

Finally, the app is worth a visit, but it needs some improvement. I'd start by removing everything that's 2D.
